text: We need to redesign the notification system. The current one is too slow and users are missing critical alerts.
Agreed. I've been looking into this. The main bottleneck is the synchronous email sending in the request cycle.
Let's go with an async queue-based approach using Redis and Celery. That should decouple the sending from the API request.
TODO: Set up the Celery worker configuration and Redis connection pooling before we start migrating handlers.
I also think we need to add support for push notifications in addition to email. Mobile users have been requesting this.
Good idea. Action item: Bob will research push notification providers (Firebase, OneSignal) and report back by Friday.
Decided: We will implement the notification queue first, then add push notifications in phase 2. Target launch is end of February.
